attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	COALESCE ( NODE_LEVEL15_NAME,NODE_LEVEL14_NAME,
	NODE_LEVEL13_NAME, NODE_LEVEL12_NAME,
	NODE_LEVEL11_NAME,NODE_LEVEL10_NAME, 
	NODE_LEVEL09_NAME,NODE_LEVEL08_NAME,
	NODE_LEVEL07_NAME, NODE_LEVEL06_NAME,
	NODE_LEVEL05_NAME,NODE_LEVEL04_NAME, 
	NODE_LEVEL03_NAME,NODE_LEVEL02_NAME,
	NODE_LEVEL01_NAME ) DD_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME ,
	LEVEL1.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL01_NAME ,
	LEVEL1.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL01_DESCR  ,          
	LEVEL1.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT,
	LEVEL2.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL02_NAME ,
	LEVEL2.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL02_DESCR,            
	LEVEL2.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL02_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL3.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL03_NAME ,
	LEVEL3.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL03_DESCR,            
	LEVEL3.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL03_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL4.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL04_NAME ,
	LEVEL4.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL04_DESCR,            
	LEVEL4.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL04_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL5.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL05_NAME ,
	LEVEL5.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL05_DESCR,            
	LEVEL5.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL05_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL6.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL06_NAME ,
	LEVEL6.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL06_DESCR,            
	LEVEL6.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL06_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL7.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL07_NAME ,
	LEVEL7.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL07_DESCR,            
	LEVEL7.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL07_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL8.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL08_NAME ,
	LEVEL8.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL08_DESCR,            
	LEVEL8.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL08_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL9.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL09_NAME ,
	LEVEL9.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL09_DESCR,            
	LEVEL9.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL09_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL10.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL10_NAME ,
	LEVEL10.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL10_DESCR,            
	LEVEL10.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL10_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL11.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL11_NAME ,
	LEVEL11.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL11_DESCR,            
	LEVEL11.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL11_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL12.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL12_NAME ,
	LEVEL12.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL12_DESCR,            
	LEVEL12.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL12_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL13.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL13_NAME ,
	LEVEL13.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL13_DESCR,            
	LEVEL13.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL13_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL14.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL14_NAME ,
	LEVEL14.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL14_DESCR,            
	LEVEL14.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL14_SEQ_NUM_INT,  
	LEVEL15.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME AS NODE_LEVEL15_NAME ,
	LEVEL15.GEOGRAPHIC_ENTITY_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL15_DESCR,            
	LEVEL15.GE_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL15_SEQ_NUM_INT 
from (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =1 ) level1 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =2 ) level2
	on level1.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level2.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =3 ) level3
	on level2.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level3.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =4 ) level4
	on level3.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level4.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =5 ) level5
	on level4.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level5.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =6 ) level6 
	on level5.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level6.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =7 ) level7 
	on level6.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level7.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =8 ) level8 
	on level7.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level8.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =9 ) level9 
	on level8.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level9.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =10 ) level10
	on level9.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level10.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =11 ) level11 
	on level10.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level11.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =12 ) level12 
	on level11.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level12.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =13 ) level13 
	on level12.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level13.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =14 ) level14 
	on level13.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level14.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
left outer join (select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIER_NODE  Where DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =15) level15 
	on level14.BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME = level15.RU_PRNT_FIN_GEO_ENT_HIER_ND_NM 
where 
 COALESCE ( NODE_LEVEL15_NAME,NODE_LEVEL14_NAME,	NODE_LEVEL13_NAME, NODE_LEVEL12_NAME,
	NODE_LEVEL11_NAME,NODE_LEVEL10_NAME, 	NODE_LEVEL09_NAME,NODE_LEVEL08_NAME,	NODE_LEVEL07_NAME, NODE_LEVEL06_NAME,
	NODE_LEVEL05_NAME,NODE_LEVEL04_NAME, 	NODE_LEVEL03_NAME,NODE_LEVEL02_NAME,	NODE_LEVEL01_NAME ) 
not in( 
   select BK_FIN_GEO_ENTY_HIER_NODE_NAME  from $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIN_GEO_ENTITY_HIERARCHY MGH
   )
